Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Standard P2P flow generally 1 Create Purchase Requisition 2 Approve Purchase Requisition 3 Issue Purchase Order 4 Receive Goods 5 Vendor Invoice Received 6 Match Invoice to PO 7 Release Payment 8 Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Important control points No PO should be issued before requisition approval Payment should not be released before goods receipt and invoice matching Goods should not be received before PO is issued Invoice matching should happen before payment

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1001 This looks like the standard flow Timing makes sense

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1002 Issue Purchase Order before approval Approve Purchase Requisition happens after invoice received and payment released Payment released before goods receipt Payment released before matching invoice to PO

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So Case 1002 has multiple anomalies PO issued before PR approved Payment released before goods receipt Payment released before matching invoice to PO Approval happens very late after payment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: PO issued without approval is a major control violation This is completely out of order This violates three way match controls

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1003 Release Payment happens before Vendor Invoice Received before Receive Goods and before Match Invoice to PO

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This is a major violation Payment is made before even receiving the invoice or goods This breaks the three way match and basic procurement controls

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1004 Receive Goods happens before Issue Purchase Order

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: You cannot receive goods before issuing a PO There is no authorized purchase order sent to the vendor yet goods are received This suggests a maverick purchase or goods received without authorization

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Summary of anomalies Case 1002 PO before approval payment before matching payment before goods receipt approval after payment Case 1003 payment before invoice payment before goods receipt payment before matching Case 1004 goods receipt before PO

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: Risks include fraud unauthorized spend paying for undelivered goods lack of audit trail and undermining spend control
